title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: LA PINE ACTIVITY CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Lunch is served three days a week. 16450 Victory Way La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Activity Center: Monday 10am-8pm, Tuesday-Friday 10am-3pm Lunch: Tuesday-Thursday 11:15am-noon (541) 536-6237 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 536-6237 Main phone Main phone (541) 536-6237 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours FEES: Lunch: Suggested donation age 60 and older $5; Age 59 and under $6 DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA PINE ACTIVITY CENTER
